# 🗞️ MORNING BRIEF — Sat June 6, 2026
*Weekend edition · futures reopen Sun 5:00 CT. Macro = live (yfinance, Fri close). Structure = DB GEX (Fri close). News = Finnhub wire + themed web. Generated by morning_brief/gather.py + Claude.*

## 1. Last 24h — what happened, and *why* (a three-way pileup)
Friday was the **worst day since April 2025**, and three forces hit at once:
- **🔴 Rates:** Hot jobs (NFP **+172k**, unemployment **4.3%**) killed rate-cut hopes. **10Y +6bp → 4.54%, 5Y +9bp → 4.28%** (front-end led = hike fear), 30Y ~5.00%. Bear-flattening.
- **🔴 Chips:** **Broadcom earnings miss** drove a semiconductor (SOX) **~−10%** flush off all-time highs — the AI-capex profit-taking unwind. This is *why Nasdaq fell ~2× the S&P.*
- **🔴 Geopolitics (weekend, fresh):** In the ongoing Strait of Hormuz crisis, **Iran launched drones toward the Strait Fri night; US CENTCOM downed four and struck Iranian radar sites** (Goruk, Qeshm Is.). Brent has held >$100 for months; **weekend escalation = Monday oil gap-up risk.**

**Result: NQ −4.8% · ES −2.6% · RTY −3.6% · YM −1.4%.**

## 2. Divergence — themed risk-off, not random
| Index | Fri | |
|---|---|---|
| Dow (YM) | −1.4% | least hit — value |
| S&P (ES) | −2.6% | broad |
| Russell (RTY) | −3.6% | small-caps (rate-sensitive) |
| **Nasdaq (NQ)** | **−4.8%** | **epicenter — chips + rates** |

Clean rotation **out of growth/tech, into large-cap value** — rates + a chip-specific shock, with a geopolitical overlay. A themed flush, not a random one.

🚨 **VIX term structure in BACKWARDATION** (9-day 23.9 > 30-day 21.5) — the acute, immediate-stress signal. The market is pricing *near-term* fear above later fear.

## 4. 🚨 Event gate — a loaded, two-sided week
- **Wed 6/10 — CPI (T1), 7:30 CT.** The marquee event, into live hike fear. **The landmine.**
- **6/17 — FOMC (T1).** ~99% hold priced; year-end hike odds elevated.
- **🟢 Bullish wildcard:** Trump (Fri) floated the **US taking equity stakes in top AI firms**; AI leaders meet at the **White House next week** (Jensen Huang already there Fri). Real counterweight for NVDA/AI — but politically contested.
- **⚪ Watch:** **oil** (Hormuz gap risk), SpaceX IPO Thu, Apple WWDC.

## 5. Regime read — what it means for *your* edge
**Dealer gamma NEGATIVE on QQQ & SPY at Friday's close** (trend-amplifying) **+ VIX backwardation + a live geopolitical tail.** Every dial points the same way: **high realized vol, gap risk, trend/continuation** — the opposite of the calm, pinned *range* your fade-and-average-down needs. Until vol resets and price reclaims the gamma flip, this is a **stand-aside-leaning tape.**
- GEX walls (magnets): **QQQ** 707 / 705 / 700 · **SPY** 740 / 739 / 735.

## 6. 🪞 The mirror — your discipline flag
- **Fri 6/5 was your worst logged day ever: −$1,625, 0-for-2** (4-contract averaged-down longs into the falling tape) — and the **only T1 (event) day in your entire 33-position log.** *(n=1 as a T1 rule, but the same fingerprint as 5/27's −$1,150.)*
- **Wednesday's CPI is the next version of that exact trap:** event print + negative gamma + VIX backwardation + oil/Iran headline risk. If you trade it: **wait for the print to settle, no adds past R1, hard −$300 floor — or just don't.** A flat Wednesday is a winning Wednesday.
